name: stage2-rvv-scalar-broadcast-route-control
title: Stage2 RVV scalar-broadcast route-control provider-plan integration
description: Integrate the existing RVV scalar-broadcast elementwise route family/provider path with the shared route-control provider plan so supported scalar_broadcast add/sub/mul routes validate AVL/VL, policy, capability, config, materialization, operand bindings, and ownership through the route-control boundary before route construction.
